---
title: "spherical_geodesic_distance"
generated: true
description: "All-pairs great-circle distance between Cartesian points on a sphere."
---

[â€ą back to `nitrix.geometry.sphere`](../nitrix-geometry-sphere.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:spherical_geodesic_distance -->
```python
spherical_geodesic_distance(X: Float[Array, '... n 3'], Y: Optional[Float[Array, '... m 3']] = None, r: float = 1.0) -> Float[Array, '... n m']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:spherical_geodesic_distance -->
All-pairs great-circle distance between Cartesian points on a sphere.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:spherical_geodesic_distance -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Float` | `...` Ă— `n` Ă— `3` | â€” | First set of points on the sphere, Cartesian, `(..., n, 3)`. |
| `Y` | `Optional[Float[Array, '... m 3']]` | â€” | `None` | Second set; if `None`, computes pairwise distance within `X`. Shape `(..., m, 3)`. |
| `r` | `float` | â€” | `1.0` | Sphere radius. The returned distance is `r * angle`. |

**Returns** `Float` â€” shape `...` Ă— `n` Ă— `m`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:spherical_geodesic_distance -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks â€” nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **111.5 Âµs** (median, L4); up to **303.96Ă— faster** than `sklearn.haversine`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_SPHERICAL_GEODESIC_DISTANCE.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cpu | n=1024 | `cupy.spherical_geodesic_distance` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cpu | n=1024 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 10.82 ms / 13.66 ms | 94.86 ms | 768 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00024Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cpu | n=1024 | `sklearn.haversine` | ok | 33.24 ms / 36.11 ms | 33.66 ms | 768 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.0013Ă—tol | 3.07x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cuda12 | n=1024 | `cupy.spherical_geodesic_distance` | ok | 3.68 ms / 3.74 ms | 134.18 ms | 0.01 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00026Ă—tol | 34.01x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cuda12 | n=1024 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 108.3 Âµs / 111.5 Âµs | 309.45 ms | 41.96 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00026Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cuda12 | n=1024 | `sklearn.haversine` | ok | 32.91 ms / 32.97 ms | 33.38 ms | 0.01 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.0013Ă—tol | 303.96x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cpu | n=256 | `cupy.spherical_geodesic_distance` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cpu | n=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 924.3 Âµs / 982.0 Âµs | 85.77 ms | 768 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00021Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cpu | n=256 | `sklearn.haversine` | ok | 2.42 ms / 2.53 ms | 2.69 ms | 768 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.0011Ă—tol | 2.62x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cuda12 | n=256 | `cupy.spherical_geodesic_distance` | ok | 400.3 Âµs / 406.3 Âµs | 1.199 s | 0.00 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.0002Ă—tol | 4.29x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cuda12 | n=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 93.4 Âµs / 95.4 Âµs | 279.61 ms | 34.08 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.0002Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cuda12 | n=256 | `sklearn.haversine` | ok | 2.18 ms / 2.24 ms | 2.69 ms | 0.00 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.0011Ă—tol | 23.35x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cpu | n=512 | `cupy.spherical_geodesic_distance` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cpu | n=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 3.06 ms / 3.79 ms | 90.20 ms | 768 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00024Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cpu | n=512 | `sklearn.haversine` | ok | 8.56 ms / 9.10 ms | 10.05 ms | 768 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.0013Ă—tol | 2.79x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `cupy.spherical_geodesic_distance` | ok | 1.05 ms / 1.06 ms | 146.06 ms | 0.01 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00021Ă—tol | 11.44x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 91.9 Âµs / 92.6 Âµs | 319.56 ms | 36.70 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00025Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| spherical_geodesic_distance | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `sklearn.haversine` | ok | 9.35 ms / 11.19 ms | 9.04 ms | 0.01 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.0013Ă—tol | 101.69x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `8171f3fa` Â· nitrix `f42e7ff8`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:spherical_geodesic_distance -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `3` | *(undocumented â€” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
